center.name: 科皮亞波省
center.summary: 科皮亞波省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Chilean mockingbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Chilean mockingbird is found in Chile from Copiapó Province in the Atacama Region south to Los Lagos, Puerto Montt, and Chiloé Island

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Chilean mockingbird is found in Chile from Copiapó Province in the Atacama Region south to Los Lagos, Puerto Montt, and Chiloé Island
